inputs.text: A stunning Korean idol photographed from behind, looking over her shoulder with a dreamy ethereal gaze. Heart-shaped face with full lips, flawless porcelain skin, subtle auburn tint short bob cut catching fluorescent overhead light. She wears a midnight blue sequined evening gown that shimmers under the harsh parking garage fluorescents, creating an unexpected contrast of glamour against concrete brutalism. Shot on 24mm wide angle, dynamic low perspective, wide environmental portrait with her figure small in frame. Blue hour twilight seeps through the garage entrance behind her, mixing cool ambient tones with warm artificial light. Dramatic cinematic shadows stretch across painted concrete columns. Styled editorial makeup, soft bokeh, film grain, epic cinematic quality.
lowres, blurry, bad anatomy, watermark, signature, oversaturated, harsh lighting, plastic skin
